---
title: "subscribeNodeValues()"
description: "Subscribe to DATA values from a Node. Protocol internals stay below the adapter boundary: DATA drives value listeners, ERROR/COMPLETE route to optional lifecycle callbacks."
---

Subscribe to DATA values from a Node. Protocol internals stay below the adapter boundary:
DATA drives value listeners, ERROR/COMPLETE route to optional lifecycle callbacks.

## Import

```ts
import { subscribeNodeValues } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters";
```

## Signature

```ts
function subscribeNodeValues(
	node: Node<T>,
	run: (value: T | undefined) => void,
	opts: SubscribeValuesOptions<T> = {},
): () => void
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `node` | `Node<T>` | Missing @param node JSDoc. |
| `run` | `(value: T \| undefined) => void` | Missing @param run JSDoc. |
| `opts` | `SubscribeValuesOptions<T>` | Missing @param opts JSDoc. |

## Returns

`() => void`
